paper_statement: For the Section 6.1 two-state HMM, the valid schedules sqrt(epsilon) and 0.7/log(1/epsilon) yield decreasing p_1000 as epsilon decreases, with the logarithmic schedule performing better; the invalid schedules epsilon^2, 0, and 1 do not converge.
predeclared_acceptance: both valid schedules have non-overlapping endpoint decreases
each invalid schedule is separated from both valid schedules at inverse epsilon 250
the logarithmic valid schedule has lower mean error
the logarithmic schedule is better at at least 18 of 23 points
an independent full-vector recurrence agrees with scalar odds to 2e-13
a valid/invalid label-swap negative control is rejected
